name: Tampa Gun and Pawn
description_short: Family-owned Tampa pawn shop since 1979 specializing in gold, diamonds, silver, and jewelry purchases or pawn loans with same-day cash.
description_long:
Tampa Gun and Pawn has operated as a family-owned pawn brokerage in Tampa, Florida since 1979, representing over 45 years in the industry. The business is located at 12319 N Nebraska Ave in Tampa and serves the greater Tampa metropolitan area including Carrollwood, Lutz, Land O Lakes, Temple Terrace, Wesley Chapel, North Tampa, Brandon, Riverview, and South Tampa. The company positions itself as "Tampa's oldest and most respected pawn shop" and emphasizes their long-standing reputation and family heritage in the business.

The company offers two primary transaction types: direct purchases of items for cash and pawn loans using items as collateral. Their primary focus is precious metals and jewelry, including gold (new, old, scrap, broken, coins, bars, dental, and jewelry), silver (bars, coins, ingots, jewelry, flatware), diamonds (loose, rings, earrings, necklaces, pendants), and platinum products. Beyond precious metals, they accept a diverse range of collateral including US and world coins, antique and estate jewelry, luxury watches, motorcycles, cars, laptop computers, musical instruments (electric guitars, amps), sports cards and memorabilia, power tools, generators, and electric bicycles. All transactions are conducted on a cash-only basis with no checks accepted.

Tampa Gun and Pawn differentiates itself through several operational claims: they state they "pay the most money for gold and diamonds in Tampa" and will "match or beat any written quote from competitors." Customer testimonials highlight personalized service, competitive pricing on specific items like diamond rings, and the discovery of unique jewelry pieces. The business emphasizes accessibility and breadth of acceptable collateral, indicating willingness to evaluate any item of value. Their "All Cash - All the Time" policy is presented as a distinguishing feature.

The business model is straightforward pawn brokerage with emphasis on precious metals acquisition. Honest assessment: this is a legitimate pawn operation focused on high-value items like jewelry and metals rather than consumer electronics or general goods. Consumers should understand that pawn loans involve interest and fees not detailed on the website, and that the competitive pricing claims (matching competitors) would require independent verification. The website contains no information about loan terms, interest rates, holding periods, or redemption policies—standard details for pawn transactions.
pros: 45+ years of family ownership and industry experience in Tampa market
Wide range of accepted collateral beyond precious metals including vehicles, instruments, and electronics
Same-day cash payment policy with no checks
Stated price-matching guarantee against written competitor quotes
Specialization in precious metals with dedicated expertise in gold, diamonds, and silver valuation
Serves broad geographic area (10+ Tampa-area communities)
Positive customer testimonials highlighting fair pricing and personalized service
cons: No transparent disclosure of loan terms, interest rates, APR, or redemption fees on website
No posted holding period policy or item recovery procedures
Competitive pricing claims require independent verification (no third-party confirmation provided)
Limited information about what happens to unredeemed items or pawn loan extension policies
No online application or quote system; requires in-person or phone contact for valuations
best_for: Individuals needing immediate cash for jewelry, gold, or precious metal items
People with motorcycles, cars, or musical instruments seeking short-term collateral loans
Those liquidating estate jewelry or inherited precious metals for fair market value
Consumers seeking local pawn services with established reputation in Tampa market
diagnosis: Tampa Gun and Pawn is best suited for Tampa-area residents who own jewelry, precious metals, vehicles, or musical instruments and need quick cash via collateral-based loans or direct sales. Main caveat: the website provides no loan terms, interest rates, fees, or redemption policies—essential information consumers should obtain directly before transacting, as these details significantly impact the true cost and value of pawn transactions.
services: Gold purchases (new, old, scrap, broken, coins, bars, dental, jewelry)
Silver purchases and loans (bars, coins, ingots, jewelry, flatware)
Diamond purchases (loose, rings, earrings, necklaces, pendants)
Sports memorabilia and coin collection purchases
Power tool and generator collateral loans
Pawn loans with items as collateral
Direct cash purchases for items of value
